No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with relevant technical skills in computer networks for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: Provide a thorough understanding of computer networks
理解自然科學與數位科技

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly addresses gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters '創新能力' (innovation ability) and provides skills in 'computer networking,' contributing to technological upgrading (Target 8.2) and preparing students for decent jobs.
evidence: 培養邏輯推理、獨立思考與創新能力
理解自然科學與數位科技

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core subject, 'computer networking' and 'the Internet,' is fundamental to developing quality, reliable, and resilient digital infrastructure (Target 9.1) and increasing access to ICT (Target 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly addresses reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course covers 'network security,' which contributes to combating crime (Target 16.a), and the study of the 'Internet' supports public access to information (Target 16.10).
evidence: 具有專業及道德責任的認知

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances ICT capacity (Target 17.8) and fosters an 'international perspective' on technology, supporting global knowledge sharing and international cooperation (Target 17.6).
evidence: 瞭解資訊科技發展趨勢與具備國際視野
